body.title: [sprint] Materialize the phantom rules namespace: 14 rule artifacts cited 86x by skills, rules/ has 1 file
body.description:
intention: I intend that every rule the audit gates cite resolves to a readable JSON artifact in the canonical store.

rebuildability-diff.20260707.md F1 (CRITICAL): skills reference unseenuniversity/rules/{approach-frame,database,coding,memory,safeguards,capability-protocol,inherit-base-class,docs-live-in-code,collaboration,igor-constraints,preferred,ticket,budget,metrics} 86 times; devlab/runtime/memory/rules/ contains only path_moves.json. Write each as rules/<name>.json (uniform envelope via memory_emit, category rules), content extracted from CLAUDE.md + owning decisions + the citing skills' implied semantics, each rule carrying its why (CP3) and validity_conditions once T-memory-validity-conditions-design lands. sprint-ticket's inertia check (cat rules/*safeguards*) must return the safeguards rule afterward.

**Affected files:** devlab/runtime/memory/rules/ (14 new JSON artifacts via memory_emit); no skill edits (citations already point here)

**Design rules:** canonical store one home; every rule carries its why; memory_emit is the write chokepoint

**Scope boundary:** materialize the 14 cited rules ONLY; no new rules invented; no skill text changes; content questions that can't be answered from CLAUDE.md/decisions go to Akien as Q-numbered open questions on this ticket rather than guessed.

**Test plan:** script check — every unseenuniversity/rules/<name> cited in skills/ resolves to a rules/*.json artifact; grep count of unresolved citations == 0.

**Completion criteria:** unresolved-citation count 0 (from 14); cat rules/*safeguards* non-empty; each artifact has a why field.

**Validation:** Observable via the citation-resolution script output committed with the change.

audit-emphasis: doc-only

## Pre-computed constraints (auto-stamped at add time)
[hard_block] ⛔ NO SQLITE. EVER. POSTGRES OR FLAT-FILE ONLY. See banner at top of this file. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[hard_block] Log every state change and every interface crossing. State changes: ticket status — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] No TheIgors imports. UnseenUniversity must be portable without TheIgors present. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] No live keys or passwords in source. `.env` is gitignored. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] `pip install -e .` must succeed at all times (even with empty stubs). — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] Canonical dev-process memory — one home, no exceptions. Every dev-process artifact — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] device.py and shim.py are the design center. Every component inherits from — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] `~/.unseen_university/logs/<device>/<stream>/` is the canonical log hierarchy — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] Every ticket closes proven, or declares itself unproven — no discriminator. A ticket that — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
…and 39 more (lower-severity or capped) — query constraints_get for the full set
body.intention: I intend that every rule the audit gates cite resolves to a readable JSON artifact in the canonical store.
